statement: In every magma, Equation 585 (`x = y * (z * (z * (w * z)))`) implies Equation 497 (`x = y * (x * (z * (w * z)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0774
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op z (op w z))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op z (op w z))))
